executor_model: Opus 4.8 (1M context) orchestrator; report drafted by 5 Sonnet section-writers + 1 Opus adversarial anti-generic/anti-flattery critic (prior gate)
scope_summary: Claude self-improvement retrospective; no product code/AIKB/ClaudeOS/CLAUDE.md/Azure/provider changes. Read-only analysis producing recommendations + rule candidates only; nothing implemented.
method: 5 Sonnet section-writers grounded in a first-hand incident ledger (vault anti-patterns/patterns/lessons + this session's i18n/SQL/audit gates) + 1 Opus adversarial critic (overall_pass=false -> its fixes applied during assembly: root-cause relabeled INFER, rules de-duplicated under stable IDs, unenforceable enforcements replaced with external checkers, schema gaps filled, sacred-rule-narrowing caveats added, self-flattery cut).
key_finding: A complete, trial-ready governance protocol (00-Meta/governance/claude-session-protocol.md, dated 2026-05-14) already exists -- 7 risk profiles, hard gates, COMMIT/PUSH-PROOF blocks, a canonical report template -- but is 'TRIAL READY / NOT WIRED YET' because CLAUDE.md does not point to it, so none of it fires. Highest leverage = activate + harden what already exists, not invent new rules. Unloaded governance is worse than none: it implies gates exist when they do not.
root_cause: INFER / NEEDS VERIFICATION (operator-asserted): assistant-mode default ('produce a full-looking answer') vs executor-mode required ('do the precise full work, verify every DONE-STATE item, iterate'). Concrete enforceable counter = R-17 (no done/passed/CLEARED emitted without a per-item evidence tuple in the report, checked by a separate reviewer).
top_p0_recommendations: R-01 wire claude-session-protocol.md into CLAUDE.md (activate the 7 risk profiles + hard gates + canonical report schema)
R-17 PRE-EMIT status-word gate: no done/passed/CLEARED without a per-item evidence tuple, reviewer-checked
R-10 no self-acceptance: implementing lens != accepting lens (REVIEWER IDENTITY report field)
R-04 POST-SUBAGENT re-verify before relay (evidence tuple per DONE-STATE item)
R-07 semantic + persistence + negative evidence for UI/E2E (green tests != correct)
R-03 PRE-TYPE number guard as a reviewer-checked report field (NUMBERS CITED / UNSOURCED NUMERICS)
R-05 external-call evidence triple per LIVE_REAL row + R-06 stub-fingerprint negative assertion
evidence_anchors_fact: Green 137/137 backend suite was structurally blind to all 4 of its own P0s (this session's audit gate)
Implementing auditor self-passed its own 603-line controller; a separate Opus reviewer caught it (this session)
Worker 'Phase 5 done' relayed as 'backend 100%'; ~20% was missing (A-021)
grep-onClick UI audit missed 3 live dead buttons + a lying caption (L-009)
'Failed to fetch' was a 500-from-missing-DB, not a CORS bug (this session)
limitations: NOT_AVAILABLE: GPT dossier / consolidated GPT-chat recommendations were not attached to the source prompt; not invented
Root cause (assistant-vs-executor mode) is operator-asserted INFER, not machine-verified
Every item is a RECOMMENDATION / RULE CANDIDATE; nothing implemented; activation requires separate approved gates
Person names sanitized to roles for this public repo; project-specific FACT claims were verified first-hand in this session's prior gates
